title: aristolochia serpentaria var. bartonii
intro: Aristolochia serpentaria var. bartonii, also known as Barton's snake root, is a variety of the serpentaria plant, a flowering perennial native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Barton's snake root include relief from menstrual cramps, arthritis, and other conditions associated with inflammation and muscle spasms. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in a salve or oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
